details: Building portfolio website using Next.js 16, React 19, and Tailwind CSS v4
Practicing clean Git workflow with Conventional Commits and PR-based development
Assisted in the development and maintenance of the IT stack for USHER Technologies Inc., contributing to various projects and tasks as needed.
Developed backend REST APIs and contributed to full-stack system delivery, including database design and frontend integration for an inventory system used by 15+ operational staff.
Improved employee operational workflow efficiency by developing secure stock-tracking APIs and deploying a production-ready inventory system on DigitalOcean within a 2-month timeline.
Led the Cloud and Infrastructure team, organizing AWS hands-on workshops, study sessions, and technical training for members.
Mentored students during onboarding and facilitated AWS Cloud Practitioner certification preparation sessions.
